scores.correctness_notes: Covers all supported bases and architectures, correctly explains multi-base syntax with omitting top-level base, matches gold standard well
scores.hallucination_notes: The arm64 platform example with 'build-on: [amd64, arm64]' is plausible but not in gold standard; the 'ubuntu@devel as build-base only' note is slightly off (gold says ubuntu@devel is supported as build-base, but response implies interim releases require explicit build-base which isn't in gold); the CRAFT_PLATFORM env var and --platform flag aren't in gold standard but are plausible CLI details; 'within a single platform entry all build-on and build-for must share same base' constraint not in gold
